question:
A user 'alice@corp.com' attempts to log in. The authentication succeeds and MFA is required. Generate a session token 'sess_abc123' that expires in 1 hour. Return ONLY this JSON object with NO markdown, NO explanations:

{
  "user_id": "alice@corp.com",
  "auth_status": "success",
  "mfa_required": true,
  "session_token": "sess_abc123",
  "session_expiry": "2025-10-28T18:30:00Z",
  "error_reason": null
}
